userStories.title: App Bootstrap
userStories.description: Create `apps/api/src/main.ts` and `apps/api/src/app.module.ts`. `main.ts` uses AppFactory.create with Fastify platform, prefix `api`, Swagger enabled (title: "Koda API"). Port from `API_PORT` env (default 3100). `app.module.ts` imports ConfigModule (global), PrismaModule, AuthModule, AgentsModule, ProjectsModule, TicketsModule, CommentsModule.
acceptanceCriteria: `bun run build` passes without errors
Server starts on port 3100 by default
`GET /api/docs` returns HTTP 200
AppFactory.create is used with Fastify platform adapter
Global route prefix is set to `api`
Swagger title is 'Koda API'

userStories.title: Prisma Module
userStories.description: Create `apps/api/src/prisma/prisma.service.ts` and `prisma.module.ts`. PrismaService extends PrismaClient, implements OnModuleInit ($connect) and OnModuleDestroy ($disconnect). PrismaModule is `@Global()` and exports PrismaService. Run `bun run db:migrate --name init` to create the SQLite DB.
acceptanceCriteria: PrismaService connects without error on module init
`prisma.user.count()` returns 0 on a fresh database
PrismaModule is decorated with `@Global()` and exports PrismaService
OnModuleInit calls `$connect()`
OnModuleDestroy calls `$disconnect()`
SQLite database file is created after migration

userStories.title: Human Auth (JWT)
userStories.description: Create `apps/api/src/auth/` — module, controller, service, JWT strategy, guards, and DTOs. Implement register, login, refresh, and me endpoints. JWT payload includes `{ sub: userId, email, role }`. Access tokens use JWT_SECRET + JWT_EXPIRES_IN (default 7d). Refresh tokens use JWT_REFRESH_SECRET + JWT_REFRESH_EXPIRES_IN (default 30d). Passwords hashed with bcrypt rounds 12. Use `@nathapp/nestjs-auth` JwtStrategy pattern.
acceptanceCriteria: `POST /api/auth/register` with `{ email, name, password }` creates a user and returns `{ accessToken, refreshToken, user }`
`POST /api/auth/login` with valid credentials returns token pair
`POST /api/auth/login` with wrong password returns 401
`POST /api/auth/refresh` with valid refresh token returns new token pair
`GET /api/auth/me` with valid access token returns current user
`GET /api/auth/me` without token returns 401
Passwords are stored as bcrypt hashes (rounds 12)
JWT payload contains `{ sub, email, role }`

userStories.title: Agent Auth (API Key)
userStories.description: Create `apps/api/src/agents/guards/api-key.guard.ts` and `src/auth/guards/combined-auth.guard.ts`. ApiKeyGuard extracts Bearer token, computes HMAC-SHA256 with API_KEY_SECRET env, looks up Agent by apiKeyHash, attaches agent to `request.agent`, sets `request.actorType = 'agent'`. Only ACTIVE agents are allowed (reject PAUSED/OFFLINE). CombinedAuthGuard tries JwtAuthGuard first, falls back to ApiKeyGuard. Create stub `POST /api/agents` (admin JWT only) that generates a random 32-byte hex raw key, computes HMAC-SHA256 hash, stores the hash, and returns the raw key once.
acceptanceCriteria: Invalid API key returns 401
Valid API key for ACTIVE agent attaches agent to request and sets `actorType = 'agent'`
PAUSED or OFFLINE agent API key is rejected with 401
CombinedAuthGuard accepts valid JWT tokens
CombinedAuthGuard accepts valid API keys
`POST /api/agents` requires admin JWT; returns generated raw key once
Raw API key is not stored — only HMAC-SHA256 hash is persisted
HMAC-SHA256 is used (not bcrypt) for deterministic lookup

userStories.title: Global Guards & App Wiring
userStories.description: Create `@IsPublic()` decorator and `@CurrentUser()` param decorator. Register CombinedAuthGuard globally via APP_GUARD. Mark auth endpoints as `@IsPublic()`. `@IsPublic()` uses SetMetadata('isPublic', true). CombinedAuthGuard checks isPublic metadata and skips auth for public routes. `@CurrentUser()` returns `req.user` (JWT) or `req.agent` (API key) based on auth type.
acceptanceCriteria: Protected endpoint returns 401 without any auth
`@IsPublic()` endpoint is accessible without auth credentials
`@CurrentUser()` returns the JWT user when authenticated via JWT
`@CurrentUser()` returns the agent when authenticated via API key
CombinedAuthGuard is registered globally via APP_GUARD
Auth endpoints (register, login, refresh) are decorated with `@IsPublic()`
